title.rendered: CJC No DAC – MOD GRF (1-29)/Ipamorelin blend analysis

content.rendered:
ID and amount analysis of CJC No DAC – MOD GRF (1-29) and Ipamorelin peptide blend.

Please note that peptide purity cannot be measured in blends, as impurities of the mixed peptides obscure each other.

You can find the test details in the parameters section below.
